title: Data-Center Overhead Cooling-Gantry Sizing
strategies: trivial: uniform a_max sizing (evaluator baseline, always feasible) -> ~0.1
greedy: fully-stressed yield-only sizing (area = |force|/sigma); passes yield but busts the buckling gate on slender members and the sag gate on tight instances -> 0 there, high on loose instances

strong: floor each bar to max(yield, Euler-buckling) area, then uniformly scale up until the sag gate is met; feasible on all three gates and far lighter than baseline (headroom left: hardest instances ~0.37, no instance hits 1.0)
invalid: uniform a_min sizing -> yield + buckling + sag all violated everywhere -> 0
novelty: Distinct from fsx_B_0159 (vineyard trellis, stress+sag only): large multi-bay data-center cooling gantry with an added Euler-buckling gate whose critical stress scales with the chosen area, coupling the sizing decision to compression stability.
